---
title: "Videos"
description: "Videos related to the Narin Güran case: documentaries, past TV and YouTube broadcasts."
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: featured
    contents:
      - "belgeseller/**/index.qmd"
      - "gecmis-yayinlar/**/index.qmd"
      - "ugur-korkmaz/**/index.qmd"
    include:
      featured: "true"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, date, description]
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed: false
    max-items: 3
  - id: all-videos
    contents:
      - "belgeseller/**/index.qmd"
      - "gecmis-yayinlar/**/index.qmd"
      - "ugur-korkmaz/**/index.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date desc"
    grid-columns: 3
    fields: [image, title, author, date, description, categories]
    categories: true
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: true
    feed: false
---

## Featured

::: {#featured}
:::

## All Videos

::: {#all-videos}
:::
